meta.name: Enviro Stopper®
meta.heroTitle: IP66/56 Protective Cover for Harsh Environments
meta.heroDescription:
IP-rated polycarbonate cover engineered to protect manual call points and switches against dust, water ingress, tampering and vandalism.
Available with optional sounder, label hood and multiple colour configurations.
Designed for wash-down areas, outdoor installations and environments requiring elevated ingress protection.

options.6: #6 European Enclosed Back Box, 20mm Entry Point, Sealed Mounting Plate
options.7: #7 European Enclosed Back Box, 20mm Entry Point, Open Mounting Plate

options.30: #30 Label Hood with Sounder and Relay
